description_long: This is a large, circular chandelier-style sconce suspended from a ceiling mount by three angled rods. The main body consists of an octagonal metal ring, with six evenly spaced candle holders, each featuring a black base and a white candle-like element. The rods are attached to the ring with visible brass connectors, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark brown metallic structure. The top of the fixture is connected to a ceiling plate by a short chain, suggesting a sturdy and secure installation. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a hint of medieval or rustic influence, making it suitable for urban or historical-themed environments.
description: A large, octagonal chandelier sconce with six candle holders, suspended by three rods from a ceiling plate. The fixture features a dark brown metal frame with black and white candle elements and brass connectors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full octagonal ring, all six candle holders, and the three supporting rods converging at the top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the fixture, the arrangement of the rods, and the spacing of the candle holders.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the symmetry of the rods and the even distribution of the candle holders around the ring.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back side of the octagonal ring and the attachment points of the rods.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a rustic, medieval-inspired design with an octagonal metal ring, exposed rods, and simple candle holders. Brass connectors add a subtle decorative touch.
